title: The Tyrant Climbs Higher
description: On pages 18–19, this part focuses on the tyrant climbs higher, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: The Tyrant Climbs Higher. Back in the present, Wapol attacks Drum Castle and tries to turn Hiriluk’s symbol into another selfish possession. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey you with the big fat mouth!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who only "played" pirates without even fully risking your life,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Could never understand the true meaning of a pirate's flag!

summary: This part highlights the tyrant climbs higher and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
